title: Status Transition Rules

posts.author: Italo (Italo Gonsalves)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to restrict the ability to change a status based on transition rules?

Example: Item status must be in “Working on it” to transition status to “Done”.
I want to restrict the ability to go from “ToDo” to “Done”.

Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Italo,

I like this idea! Transparently, this functionality isn’t natively supported in the platform at this stage, and I apologise for the setback. That being said, I am interested if you could set up an automation in the meantime to notify the relevant person (or yourself) if the status has changed from to-do to done so it can be checked on?

Screen Shot 2023-07-28 at 2.27.26 pm1936×806 51 KB

I understand this isn’t your ideal approach, but I am intersted if it could work in the meantime!

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Italo
Welcome to the community!

Also if you need calculating the time between Item statuses i recommend you to try Time in Status app which helps to track time the Item has spent in each workflow status easily. So you can monitor how fast the Item moves between statuses.
You’ll get user-friendly data on the board in a few seconds.

Знімок екрана 2024-01-26 о 03.33.481920×488 50.2 KB

Also you will be able to track how much time your issue spends in each status and much more by generating:

  • Time in Status Report
  • Status Count Report
  • Transition Count Report

And use charts to visualize your reports a sample of a certain number according to time range/item range, or a single item:

  • Pie Charts
  • Bar Charts
  • Area Charts

Знімок екрана 2024-01-26 о 09.29.46954×1444 51.2 KB

The app is also available in the format of board integration.

Знімок екрана 2024-01-26 о 03.35.011538×634 95.8 KB

Start the 14-days free trial to try it out for yourself and share your experience with us.

Hope you find this app helpful,
Valeriia

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

If you’re open to trying out a 3rd party app, you can use our Column Changes Guard app to configure transition rules for your status column

image1547×1241 79.3 KB

You can configure it to hide disallowed statuses or to request additional details in the form to change the status.

Tell us about your use case at contact@workflow-boost.com, and we’ll be happy to help!
